Here are pytest‑style unit tests. They mock time.time so tests run deterministically. No special formatting is used.

import pytest
from unittest.mock import patch
from your_module import rate_limiter

def test_happy_path_allows_up_to_max_calls():
    limiter = rate_limiter(max_calls=3, period_seconds=10)
    with patch("time.time", return_value=100):
        assert limiter() is True
        assert limiter() is True
        assert limiter() is True
        assert limiter() is False  # 4th call blocked

def test_calls_expire_after_period():
    limiter = rate_limiter(max_calls=2, period_seconds=5)
    with patch("time.time", return_value=100):
        assert limiter() is True
        assert limiter() is True
        assert limiter() is False  # limit reached

    # Advance time past expiry
    with patch("time.time", return_value=106):
        # Old timestamps are expired; should allow again
        assert limiter() is True

def test_edge_case_zero_max_calls():
    limiter = rate_limiter(max_calls=0, period_seconds=10)
    with patch("time.time", return_value=100):
        assert limiter() is False

def test_edge_case_zero_period_allows_only_one_immediately():
    limiter = rate_limiter(max_calls=2, period_seconds=0)
    with patch("time.time", return_value=100):
        assert limiter() is True
        # period is zero, so second call happens at same time and should fail
        assert limiter() is False

def test_multiple_period_windows():
    limiter = rate_limiter(max_calls=1, period_seconds=3)

    with patch("time.time", return_value=100):
        assert limiter() is True
        assert limiter() is False

    with patch("time.time", return_value=103):
        # falls exactly on period boundary: old call should be removed
        assert limiter() is True

def test_time_moves_backward():
    # If time goes backward (edge condition), limiter should not break
    limiter = rate_limiter(max_calls=1, period_seconds=5)

    with patch("time.time", return_value=100):
        assert limiter() is True

    # Time moves backward; old call remains since now - t < period may fail
    with patch("time.time", return_value=99):
        assert limiter() is False  # still within window logically
